title: pilea pubescens var. involucrata
intro: Pilea pubescens var. involucrata, also known as the hairy Pilea or involucrate Pilea, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilea pubescens var. involucrata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in water, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
